author: aiksxd
description: Build a personalized autocomplete list for any LaTeX formula. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: aiksxd
manifest.description: Build a personalized autocomplete list for any LaTeX formula.
manifest.name: Customizable LaTeX Autocomplete

name: Customizable LaTeX Autocomplete

releases.author: aiksxd
releases.description:
# latex-autocomplete
Custom LaTeX Autocomplete for Obsidian:
This plugin puts you in control, letting you build a fully personalized autocomplete list for any LaTeX formula.
**All of them can be customized in the plugin's settings.**

### Usage Guide
After installation
1. Place cursor inside $$ / $, then type any character to trigger completion",
2. Use ↑/↓ keys to navigate suggestions, Enter to apply,
3. Press Space to cancel current completion and start new word,

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aiksxd/latex-autocomplete/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: aiksxd
releases.description:
A plugin of obsidian: Provides a matching list for completing of LaTeX formulas

### Update
1. remove inline styles and use consistent settings API
2. better text

### Usage Guide
1. Place cursor inside '$$' / '$', then type any character to trigger completion",
3. Use '↑' / '↓' keys to navigate suggestions, Enter to apply,
4. Press Space to cancel current completion and start new word,

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aiksxd/latex-autocomplete/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0
